raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1665 represents a cooperative effort between legislators and representatives from the telecommunications industry to invest in broadband access and rural development.",
    "The California Advanced Services Fund (CASF) aims to close the Digital Divide by incentivizing the expansion of broadband infrastructure to 98% of California households.",
    "The goal of the CASF was expanded to ensure broadband reach in every geographic region of California.",
    "30% of Californian households do not have access to high-speed internet or a computer.",
    "Low-income urban and rural communities are most affected by the deficit in internet connectivity.",
    "Providing internet connectivity can open up educational, health, and economic opportunities for vulnerable communities."
  ]
}
```
